visual_summary: A scroll progress bar displayed at the top of a page, typically below the navigation bar.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready bar component with the following characteristics: Name: Scroll Progress Demo Description: A scroll progress bar displayed at the top of a page, typically below the navigation bar. Style: Interactions: Tags: progress bar, scrolling, indicator Requirements: - Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS - Uses Tailwind CSS for styling - Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation - Responsive and mobile-friendly - No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary - Include all necessary imports - Export as default with sensible prop types Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations. Reference implementation (adapt don't copy): import { ScrollProgress } from "@/registry/magicui/scroll-progress" export default function ScrollProgressDemo() { return (

Note: The scroll progress is shown below the navbar of the page.

) }
